# aikido_cloud_aws (Resource)

Connects an AWS cloud environment to Aikido Security.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "aikido_cloud_aws" "production" {
  name        = "AWS Production"
  environment = "production"
  role_arn    = "arn:aws:iam::000000000000:role/aikido-security-readonly-AikidoSecurityRole"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `environment` (String) The environment classification: `production`, `staging`, `development`, or `mixed`.
- `name` (String) A name for this cloud environment.
- `role_arn` (String) The ARN for the IAM role that Aikido can assume to access the AWS account.

### Read-Only

- `external_id` (String) The AWS account ID.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the cloud environment.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# Import an AWS cloud using the format cloud_id:role_arn
terraform import aikido_cloud_aws.example "123:arn:aws:iam::000000000000:role/aikido-security-readonly-AikidoSecurityRole"
```
